title: Fabian Clarke London® 8x6 Modern Black Wooden Picture Photo Frame with White 7x5 Mount Includes Safety Glass Front Hang Portrait or Landscape
features: 🏡 INSPIRED DESIGN: This range of photo frames from Fabian Clarke London will give your home that modern interior touch. Classic bold and solid colours are set off perfectly against our ice white mounts included in every frame. These frames are hand made from high quality MDF mouldings and fixings as expected with Fabian Clarke London products.

🏠 HANG OR STAND: All frames come complete with a back easel and hanging fixings so they can stand up on a sideboard /shelf or hung on a wall. Each frame can be displayed in both portrait and landscape orientation, so it doesn’t matter which way round your photo is.

🏡 ALL FRAMES INCLUDE A MOUNT: All Fabian Clarke London frames in this range come complete with an ice white mount that can be used or removed as you wish. The mount opening is always 1 size down from the size of the frame, so for example a 7x5 frame with have a mount in it with a 6x4 opening. The mounts can be removed if you don’t want to use them.
🏡 ABOUT THE FRAME MOULDING: Our mouldings have a width of approx. 30mm and a depth of approx. 15mm. This is a fairly low-profile, modern contemporary design as seen on so many interior design shows.

🎁 GIFT WRAPPED AS STANDARD: Each of our Fabian Clarke picture frames is boxed and gift-wrapped in branded tissue paper, making them the ideal gift. We use only plexiglass for the front window, offering the same transparency as glass while being much safer.
description: Product Description A message from the founder... Fabian Clarke is a brand brought to you by founder Sarah B. Sarah started designing in 1995 and has had a long and successful career in home interiors. The brand offers simple but stylish photo frames with a focus on quality and form. We try to offer a wide range of common and popular sizes and colours so if you look through our shop you are bound to find something that you like. Thank you for taking the time to read our listing and thanks for supporting a small business. Simple and Elegant Fabian Clarke London offer a wide range of elegant frames in various sizes and colours. They are truly versatile in any design setting and will compliment any room. For a true statement piece in your home, combine various frame sizes together to make an eye catching photo collage. Choosing the Right Size Working out which size frame you need can be confusing. To help you out we've made an easy to understand size conversion chart. Our conversion chart shows sizes in A1-A7, Centimetres, Millimetres and Inches, so whatever size you have, you should be able to work out what frame you need. Just remember that if you are buying a frame with a mount in it, you need to pay attention to the size of the mount as this is the part that will display your picture. If you have an A3 picture for example, you will need a frame that has an A3 mount in it. Whatever size your picture is, will be the size of the mount you need. We highly recommend measuring your picture before you purchase. Quality Control Packaging Key Features All Fabian Clarke Frames Include: Corner Protectors Bubble Wrapped Protective Film on Window Individually Boxed Quality from Frame to Packaging Protective Film on Window All of our Fabian Clarke London frames come with a protective film on both sides of the window. This helps to protect the window from scratches during transit. The film is so thin and fine that in some cases customers don't actually realise that it's there so please make sure you peel it off from BOTH sides of the acrylic window. You should be able to lift it with a finger nail and peel it back. The finer details... All Fabian Clarke London photo frames are hand packaged ensuring they are received by you in perfect condition. Many other vendors simply shrink wrap their frames and post them like this but they offer no protection. Hang on The Wall All Fabian Clarke London frames include fixings to allow you to hang them on the wall in either portrait or landscape orientation. We offer all of our frames in jet black and true white colours. Freestand with Back Stand Our smaller frames include a back stand so that you can stand them up on a shelf or sideboard. Again you can stand them in either portrait or landscape orientation. If you want to hang the smaller frames on the wall you can remove the back stand. About our Mounts Many of our Fabian Clarke frames include a white card mount (please check the listing you are buying from to confirm this). This adds beautifully to the design and look of the frame. Our Fabian Clarke London mounts are made from Daler-Rowney conservation boards which conform to the Fine Art Guild requirements for Conservation (level 2). The boards are lignin-free with no optical brighteners and cover papers are resilient and bleed resistant. Our mounts are 1.4mm thick.
